stocktake.title: Stock-take
stocktake.intro: Walk the warehouse with this page open. For each item, set the pack size if it’s sold as a pack of pieces, then type the actual on-hand count. We’ll fix the stock to match.
stocktake.searchPlaceholder: Search items by name, code, or unit…
stocktake.allCounted: All items counted ✓ — toggle “Show counted” if you want to re-count.
stocktake.packToggle: Sold as a pack used in fractions
stocktake.packToggleHint: E.g. a polybag pack of 50 pieces, a 500 m roll of pipe, a 500-seed bag. Turn on so we can charge the right cost per piece/metre.
stocktake.actualTitle: How many do you actually have RIGHT NOW?
stocktake.actualHint: Walk to the shelf, count, type it in. We’ll fix the stock level to match — you don’t have to delete old batches yourself.
stocktake.mergeTitle: Merge this row into another item (same product from a different supplier)

useStock.title: Use stock
useStock.fifoHint: On hand: {max} {unit}. FIFO consumes the oldest batch first, so cost-of-use comes from what you paid for the earliest receive.

sellStock.title: Sell stock to a buyer
sellStock.intro: For selling inventory directly — not produce from a greenhouse. Stock comes off the shelf at FIFO cost; the profit lands on Financials as stock-resale revenue.
sellStock.overStock: More than you have on hand.
sellStock.notePlaceholder: e.g. cut from the 100 m roll
sellStock.errNeedBoth: Enter the quantity sold and what the buyer paid.

receive.title: Receive stock
receive.intro: Pick the supplier and date once, then add every item from that invoice. Reusable items (rockwool, grow bags) come back from a greenhouse — tick the toggle.
receive.prevHint: Click any to add a line pre-filled with the last unit price.
receive.needLine: Add at least one line with an item and qty > 0

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.intro: Everything at or below its reorder level, grouped by supplier. Copy a list and paste it straight into WhatsApp.
shopping.empty: Nothing needs ordering — all tracked stock is above its reorder level.
shopping.emptyTip: Tip: open an item → Edit → set “Reorder at”. Items appear here when stock falls to that level.
shopping.copiedToast: Copied — ready to paste into WhatsApp

importSheet.blurb: Photograph a handwritten list of things bought or paid for. The AI reads every line, then you check it and save them all at once.
importSheet.tipFlat: Lay the page flat, fill the frame, good light.
importSheet.tipWages: Wage (Gaji) lines come in unticked — tick them on if you want them.
importSheet.failBody: Try a clearer, flatter, brighter photo that fills the frame. If it keeps failing, you can still add expenses with New expense.
importSheet.toastFail: Couldn’t read any lines — see the note below and try again.
importSheet.errPickOne: Tick at least one line with an amount.
importSheet.differs: (differs — unticked/wage lines may account for it)

saleDialog.packagingPlaceholder: No packaging — or pick a box / bag / container
saleDialog.packagingNote: {qty} × {name} comes off stock and counts as this cycle's usage cost.
saleDialog.packagingOnTopNote: The charge above is added to the sale total.
saleDialog.packagingIncludedNote: (Cost only — not added to the sale total.)
saleDialog.customTotal: Custom total (discount / markup) — the kg and price/kg stay as entered

breakage.blurb: Melon that cracked, spoiled or spilled. Counts toward total yield — no money involved.

staff.blurb: Melon eaten or taken by staff. Counts toward total yield — nothing charged.

giveaway.blurb: Free samples or giveaways. Counts toward total yield — nothing charged.

dispoDialog.noStaffYet: No staff yet — add them on the Staff page

labourDialog.title: Log work hours on this cycle
labourDialog.noStaffYet: No staff yet — add them on the Staff page
labourDialog.emptyHint: No matches — type a new name to add it to the list.
labourDialog.customPlaceholder: What did they do? (e.g. tied up melon vines)
labourDialog.typeOrPick: Type a task or pick from the list

usageDialog.title: Use a product on this cycle
usageDialog.blurb: For things that get used up: pesticides (ml, L), nutrients (g, kg), seeds. The cost comes off stock — oldest purchases first — and counts against this cycle.

assetDialog.title: Install equipment on this cycle
assetDialog.blurb: For physical things installed in the greenhouse: drippers, plumbing, frames (Fixed) — or rockwool, grow bags (Reusable: the cost is spread across uses).
assetDialog.chargeNote: Reusable item — this cycle will be charged {charge} ({useLabel}).
assetDialog.fullCostNote: The full purchase price is already counted in Total Business Financials.

checkinDialog.title: Check in: {name}
checkinDialog.usesRemaining: · {n, plural, one {# use} other {# uses}} remaining per unit
checkinDialog.overWarning: More than you took out — allowed, but double-check.
checkinDialog.chargeHint: Only this much is charged to the greenhouse. Leftover isn't returned to stock yet (coming later).
checkinDialog.placeholderDamaged: e.g. cracked during install, motor burnt out…
checkinDialog.placeholderLost: e.g. couldn't locate at greenhouse cleanup…
checkinDialog.placeholderGood: Optional note for the audit log
